statuses.idle: Idle - add a chemical to begin
statuses.acidic: Indicator turns red - solution is acidic
statuses.basic: Indicator turns blue - solution is basic
statuses.neutral: Indicator turns green - solution is neutral
statuses.explosion: Reaction complete - a foam explosion occurred!

results.idleMessage: Select an acid and an ion to start the simulation.
results.idleExplanation: Hydrochloric acid and hydroxide ions form water and a salt in a neutralization reaction.
results.successMessage: The particles met and a stable neutralization reaction occurred.
results.successExplanation: Hydrochloric acid donates H⁺ while hydroxide accepts it, forming water and chloride ions. The reaction is exothermic and releases energy.
results.errorExplanation: This acid-ion combination does not match the required neutralization interaction, so no product forms.

about.title: About Virtual Chemistry Lab
about.body: We help middle and high school students master chemistry through safe, interactive experiments and beautiful animations. Built for the classroom, loved at home.
about.heroTitle: A modern lab for curious minds
about.heroSubtitle: Explore reactions safely, build confidence, and grow with immersive guided learning.

timeline.title: Discover
timeline.text: Start with a story-driven introduction that makes the chemistry concept feel relevant and exciting.

timeline.title: Experiment
timeline.text: Use the virtual lab to observe reactions, test hypotheses, and collect evidence safely.

timeline.title: Reflect
timeline.text: Review the results and connect the science to real world applications.

platformFeatures.title: Immersive experiments
platformFeatures.text: Beautiful simulations bring chemistry concepts to life with realistic visual feedback.

platformFeatures.title: Personal progress
platformFeatures.text: Track XP, streaks, and achievements as you grow your confidence in the lab.

platformFeatures.title: Arabic and English
platformFeatures.text: Switch between languages effortlessly and enjoy a fully localized experience.

whyChooseItems: Modern visuals and premium educational design
Guided learning that supports independent thinking
processSteps: Read the concept and choose your experiment
Run the reaction and observe the outcome
Reflect on the science and earn your next milestone
about.safetyText: Every experience is designed to feel real without the risks of a physical lab. Students can explore freely and learn responsibly.
teacherItems: Clear visual explanations for complex topics
Flexible and engaging digital learning tools
studentItems: Learn by doing in a guided virtual space
Stay motivated with progress and achievement systems
about.missionText: To make chemistry accessible, safe, and exciting for every learner through modern digital experiences.
about.visionText: To become a global benchmark for interactive science education that inspires discovery and academic growth.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to bring chemistry to life?
about.ctaText: Start your first experiment today and turn concepts into discoveries.

chatbot.name: Flasko
suggestions: Tell me about the virtual lab
chatbot.greeting: Hi! I'm Flasko 🧪 your Virtual Chemistry Lab assistant. Ask me about experiments, the lab, or how to get started!

responses.start: The best start is the Experiments page — pick an easy one like "Acid-Base Titration" and hit Start. I just opened it for you! 🚀
responses.lab: The Virtual Lab lets you mix HCl, NaOH, and an indicator and watch pH and temperature react live. Try it yourself! 🧪
responses.xp: You earn XP every time you finish an experiment, and unlock badges on the Achievements page. Keep your daily streak going for bonus XP! 🌟
responses.safe: Everything here is 100% virtual — no spills, no fumes, no real risk. Feel free to experiment freely! 🛡️
responses.contact: Opened the contact page for you — reach out anytime! ✉️
responses.hi: Hey there! 👋 How can I help with your chemistry lab today?
responses.thanks: You're welcome! 😊 I'm always here if you need me.
responses.fallback: Try asking about "experiments", "the lab", or "XP points" — I can help right away 🧪

acid-base-titration.title: Acid-Base Titration
acid-base-titration.desc: Neutralize hydrochloric acid with sodium hydroxide and watch the indicator change color.

elephant-toothpaste.title: Elephant Toothpaste
elephant-toothpaste.desc: A dramatic decomposition reaction of hydrogen peroxide.

electrolysis-of-water.title: Electrolysis of Water
electrolysis-of-water.desc: Split water into hydrogen and oxygen using electricity.

esterification.title: Making a Fruity Ester
esterification.desc: Create a banana-scented ester from an alcohol and an acid.

flame-test.title: Flame Test
flame-test.desc: Identify a metal by the color of its flame.

vitamin-c-in-juice.title: Vitamin C in Juice
vitamin-c-in-juice.desc: Measure the vitamin C content in different fruit juices.
